title: No power supply checks
body: Check the DB / MCB state before touching the charger.
Measure or confirm incoming voltage at the charger feed.
Restore the supply if the upstream issue is confirmed; otherwise escalate.

title: Tripping protection checks
body: Confirm the installed MCB / RCCB rating matches the charger load.
Inspect for overheating, looseness, or abnormal heating at cable and termination points.
Reduce current or replace the protection device only if the site SOP allows it; otherwise escalate.

title: Charging slow checks
body: Review the configured current output setting.
Confirm whether the vehicle is limiting charge acceptance.
Check for voltage drop or supply limitations and advise the customer.

title: Not responding recovery steps
body: Perform a controlled power cycle of the charger.
Inspect the PCB / control path if the display or controls remain frozen.
Reset the system once; escalate if the charger still does not respond.
